description: androidpublisher.googleapis.com is the Google Play Developer API endpoint used to manage Play Console resources such as app releases, store listings, subscriptions, in-app products, purchases, and reviews. It is part of Google Play’s developer tooling for publishing and operating Android apps.
summary: Google Play exposes one authenticated REST API at androidpublisher.googleapis.com for Play app publishing, subscriptions, in-app purchases, reviews, and related management tasks; it accepts Google OAuth 2.0 bearer tokens from either a service account or an OAuth client.
